extension_description.message: OCR para documentos e imagens no Google Chrome com Mistral.

popup_setup_title.message: Set up your Mistral API key

popup_setup_body.message: You need an API key to transcribe documents with OCR.

setup_step_create_key.message: Create an API key in Mistral Console.

setup_step_paste_key.message: Paste it in Options, under API key 1.

format_for_transcription.message: Format to use for this transcription

options_subtitle.message: Manage local credentials, export, and advanced OCR options.

options_setup_title.message: Connect Mistral OCR with your API key

options_setup_body.message: The extension runs locally in Chrome, but OCR uses your Mistral account.

options_setup_step_open.message: Open Mistral Console and create an API key.

options_setup_step_paste.message: Paste that key into API key 1.

options_setup_step_run.message: Open a compatible PDF, document, or image and use Transcribe (OCR) from the popup.

stored_locally_note.message: Stored in this extension's local Chrome storage.

api_key_2_help_intro.message: The second API key lets you switch quickly between two Mistral accounts or profiles from the popup.

api_key_2_help_free.message: Mistral's free plan may use your documents to improve its models. That means less privacy.

api_key_2_help_paid.message: Mistral's paid plan can be configured not to use your documents for training. That gives more privacy.

api_key_2_help_practical.message: Practical idea: use free when privacy matters less, and paid when the document is sensitive.

api_key_2_help_empty.message: If this key is empty, the popup will not show the API key selector.

secondary_empty_note.message: If this key is empty, the popup will not show a selector.

disable_preview_autosave_note.message: When enabled, Preview/Edit will show the Save changes button.

header_footer_note.message: These options use Mistral header/footer extraction to hide them from the final OCR result.

docx_help_intro.message: .docx is often more accurate than PDF. Mistral reads the document's real text and images better.

native_hidden_text_warning.message: Important issue: Mistral can also read hidden text.

hidden_text_explanation.message: Hidden text means text that exists in the file but you cannot see, such as size 1 white text hidden in a corner.

hidden_prompt_warning.message: Sometimes hidden instructions are added to discourage AI use. If you use .docx, Mistral may transcribe them too.

docx_size_warning.message: .docx files can also be larger and exceed Mistral's 50 MB limit.

pptx_help_intro.message: .pptx works similarly to .docx: it can be very accurate, but Mistral can also read hidden text.

pptx_hidden_text_risk.message: It has the same hidden-instruction risk as .docx.

pptx_image_warning.message: Extra issue: images may appear with odd sizes or layout in the transcription.

native_use_when_needed.message: Use it only when you need high accuracy and PDF is not enough.

google_native_note.message: Each service can export to its Office/CSV format instead of PDF.

xlsx_help_intro.message: .xlsx is often better than PDF for spreadsheets. Mistral understands tables and data better.

xlsx_good_for_tables.message: Useful when numbers, tables, or spreadsheet structure matter.

xlsx_hidden_text_warning.message: It may also include hidden text from the original file, just like .docx.

csv_help_intro.message: .csv can help with data, but it is the most fragile format.

csv_shift_warning.message: Problem: tables can shift. If one column moves, the data can be wrong.

csv_sensitive_warning.message: That can be critical when working with grades, amounts, dates, or important data.

csv_use_if_reviewing.message: Use it only if you know how to handle CSV and will review the result.

file_access_note.message: Note: to open local PDFs (file://), enable "Allow access to file URLs" for this extension in chrome://extensions.

transcriptions_subtitle.message: Search by name, URL, SHA, type, or OCR metadata.

showing_recent_transcriptions.message: Showing $COUNT$ of $TOTAL$ recent transcriptions. Open "View all" to search, export, or delete.

embedded_pdf_detected.message: A single embedded PDF was detected on this page.

open_compatible_resource.message: Open a compatible document or image to use OCR in this tab.

ocr_exists_for_document.message: OCR already exists for this document$HINT$.

no_previous_ocr_for_document.message: No previous OCR for this document.

resource_already_processed_copying.message: This resource was already processed. Copying markdown...

ocr_background_started.message: Background OCR started. You can close this popup.

content_copied.message: Conteúdo copiado para a área de transferência.

could_not_change_active_api_key.message: Could not change the active API key

could_not_check_previous_ocr_format.message: Could not check previous OCR for this format

word_kept.message: Word kept; it will no longer be highlighted.

error_no_ocrable_resource.message: No OCR-able resource was detected (compatible document or image).

downloading_resource_from_tab.message: Downloading resource from the source tab...

error_ocr_already_running.message: An OCR job is already running. Wait for it to finish or cancel it.

notification_ocr_complete_message.message: $NAME$ is ready to copy or export.

error_pdf_temp_view_timeout.message: Timeout loading the temporary PDF view.

error_open_pdf_temp_view.message: Could not open the temporary PDF view.

error_chrome_no_pdf_data.message: Chrome did not return PDF data.

error_api_key_missing.message: API key não configurada. Vá para Opções.

error_offscreen_not_supported.message: Chrome does not support offscreen documents in this environment.

offscreen_justification.message: Keep OCR running in the background and process blobs without depending on the popup.

error_download_resource_http.message: Could not download the resource. HTTP $STATUS$

error_export_file_google_docs.message: Could not export the file from Google Docs.

error_export_pdf_google_docs.message: Could not export the PDF from Google Docs.

error_export_file_google_slides.message: Could not export the file from Google Slides.

error_export_pdf_google_slides.message: Could not export the PDF from Google Slides.

error_export_file_google_sheets.message: Could not export the file from Google Sheets.

error_export_pdf_google_sheets.message: Could not export the PDF from Google Sheets.

error_upload_response_missing_file_id.message: Upload response has no file id.

error_offscreen_ocr_running.message: An offscreen OCR job is already running.

error_ocr_has_no_images.message: This OCR has no stored images.

error_invalid_google_docs_page.message: This is not a valid Google Docs page.

error_invalid_google_slides_page.message: This is not a valid Google Slides page.

error_invalid_google_sheets_page.message: This is not a valid Google Sheets page.
